home.hero.headline: WS4U: Senior Expertise meets AI-Augmented Engineering.
home.hero.sub: Scalable Laravel solutions designed in Prague, developed globally. We don't just write code; we architect systems that last.
home.philosophy.title: Beyond the Prompt.
home.philosophy.text: Anyone can generate code today. But we know what happens when a system scales. We build on robust architecture, clean code, and senior oversight. We use AI as our engine, but we are the ones steering.
home.products.badge: Architected by WS4U Core Team | Accelerated by AI-Workflows
home.blog.empty: Soon you will find our new articles about Laravel and AI here.
about.title: Our Team.
about.sub: Visionaries and tech geeks who love Laravel.
services.title: Technology & Consulting.
services.card1.title: Architecture & Consulting.
services.card1.text: We help you build your project on the right foundations. The first analysis is on us.
services.card2.title: Legacy Code Refresh.
services.card2.text: Have old code? We'll breathe new life into it with AI and transition it to modern architecture.
services.card3.title: Custom Laravel Development.
services.card3.text: Robust, secure, and scalable enterprise applications built on 20 years of experience.
services.card4.title: AI Integration & R&D.
services.card4.text: Implementation of AI frameworks and research on our own Laravel Copilot for maximum efficiency.
references.empty: We are actively working on several large projects. You will find the first case studies here soon. In the meantime, check out our Products.
team.david.title: Founder & Project Lead
team.david.text: 20 years of experience. Started his career in 2003 at Seznam.cz. Brain & heart of our team, Laravel evangelist and full-time visionary.
team.adam.title: Co-founder & Tech Lead
team.adam.text: David's long-term partner. Tech geek and author of custom 'hacks' and innovations, solving every 'unsolvable' problem.
team.helena.title: Back Office
team.helena.text: Calm force behind our development. Handles administration and smooth communication, so we can focus on creating.

error.500.text: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. We are working on a fix.
